sprint: 0.2.0 noahmp daytime HFX residual — LOCALIZATION (no faithful fix in scope)
objective: Localize the +5% daytime land-HFX over-flux (GPU midday land HFX 485 vs WRF 459, +25 W/m2) that holds TOST-T2 paired-delta at +0.417K (outside +/-0.215). Hypothesized Noah-MP levers: (a) canopy/bare FSH Newton/CANHS, (b) surface exchange CH, (c) absorbed net rad SAV/SAG high, (d) daytime ground heat flux too low.
method: Coupled GPU Noah-MP (use_noahmp=ON) d03 1km, 18z init, dt=3, advanced to daytime leads 15/18/21 (=09z/12z/15z) + overnight 3/6/9/12. Land-mean GPU HFX/LH/GRDFLX/CH/SAV+SAG/TSK/T2 + the GPU's OWN held RRTMG SWDOWN + GPU Noah-MP SALB(=FSR/SWDOWN) vs pristine-WRF hourly wrfout. Repro: /tmp/daytime_localize.py (WT_SRC -> this worktree src).
harness_artifact_fixed: carry.noahmp_rad is the RAW (soldn,lwdn,cosz) 3-tuple held in the carry; assemble_noahmp_forcing's rad2d() reads .lwdn/.soldn/.cosz via getattr, so it MUST be wrapped in _NoahMPRadiation (exactly as operational_mode.py:1825 does). The earlier overnight-localization harness passed the raw tuple -> LWDN=0 -> bogus runaway-cold GRDFLX ~-217. Wrapping it gives overnight GRDFLX matching WRF (-69/-64 etc.) — confirming the committed GRDFLX over-conduction (ZSOIL) fix is genuinely working.

overnight_confirmed_clean.note: After the harness wrap fix, all overnight leads match WRF — no regression.

daytime_decomposition.columns: lead/time | gpu_SWDOWN / wrf_SWDOWN (ratio) | gpu_SALB | gpu_SAV+SAG | HFX_bias | LH_bias | gpu_GRDFLX/wrf_GRDFLX | TSK_bias | T2_bias
daytime_decomposition.wrf_albedo_ref: wrfout ALBEDO land-mean 0.203 (09z) / 0.197 (12z) / 0.197 (15z); CLDFRA ~0.03 (clear sky), QCLOUD colmax ~3.6e-6 -> WRF midday is clear-sky.

localized_term: RRTMG-SW clear-sky SURFACE DOWNWARD shortwave (rrtmg_sw.surface_down, via coupling/physics_couplers.py:961 swdown=sw.surface_down). NOT the Noah-MP land surface.
evidence_chain: GPU Noah-MP SALB (FSR/SWDOWN) = 0.199-0.203 at every daytime lead == WRF wrfout ALBEDO 0.197-0.203 -> the Noah-MP two-stream/GROUNDALB albedo is FAITHFUL (NOT lever c-as-albedo). GROUNDALB/ALBSAT/ALBDRY indexing verified: rp.albsat=[0.09,0.18] = WRF ALBSAT_TABLE(SOILCOLOR=4); _color_band builds a 1-based-padded (MSC+1,2) array so soilcolor=4 selects the correct row (no off-by-one). Dry soil smc1=0.083 (==WRF) -> inc=0.077 -> broadband albedo ~0.194 == WRF.
GPU SAV+SAG = gpu_SWDOWN*(1-gpu_SALB) self-consistently (e.g. 12z: 1066.4*0.801=854) -> the excess absorbed SW is entirely the SWDOWN excess, not the albedo.

gpu_SWDOWN/wrf_SWDOWN ratio is air-mass dependent: +11.3% at 09z (cosz~0.5, long slant path) -> +4.1% at 12z (cosz~0.94) -> -0.6% at 15z. This 1/cos(zenith) scaling is the signature of too-weak clear-sky atmospheric attenuation (Rayleigh/aerosol/water-vapor) along the slant path in RRTMG-SW.
GRDFLX is FAITHFUL day and night (12z 148 vs 154; overnight within ~5 W/m2) -> lever (d) ground-heat-flux-too-low FALSIFIED.

VEGE_FLUX/BARE_FLUX Newton (NITERC early-exit LITER semantics), CANHS (in Newton denom + closure), SFCDIF1 unstable/daytime Paulson functions, RAGRB, RSURF/RHSUR (SZ09 OPT_RSF=1), psychrometric GAMMAV/GAMMAG, FSH tile-sum, RHOAIR/EAIR — all verified line-by-line against /home/enric/src/wrf_pristine/WRF/phys/module_sf_noahmplsm.F (:3870-4175 VEGE, :4340-4460 BARE, :4583-4743 SFCDIF1, :2173-2230 RSURF, :2285-2325 tile-sum) -> levers (a) and (b) FALSIFIED (faithful).

Internal Noah-MP CH (chs land-mean ~0.013 at night, consistent) is faithful; the operational HFX uses Noah-MP's internal CH (overlay_noahmp_land_diagnostics), NOT sfclay CH. surface_layer.py CH only feeds the diagnostic T2 interpolation (already addressed by 9f808ef nocturnal-T2 fix). -> lever (b) FALSIFIED.
budget_consistency: 12z: WRF NetSW 823 = FIRA 209 + HFX 459 + LH 22 + GRDFLX 154 (closes). GPU absorbs +33 W/m2 (854 vs 823) from the +41.5 W/m2 SWDOWN excess; with LH resistance-capped on dry soil (smc 0.083, RSURF large) and GRDFLX faithful, the surplus partitions into HFX (+26) + extra FIRA from the +0.77K warmer skin. The LH deficit (-8) is a downstream symptom (warmer skin can't shed via resistance-limited evaporation), not an independent bug.
fix_decision: NO change made to energy.py or surface_layer.py. The Noah-MP land-surface code is WRF-faithful; the over-flux is NOT in scope (energy.py/surface_layer.py). Applying any HFX/albedo offset to Noah-MP to mask the +4-11% RRTMG SWDOWN excess would be a non-faithful fudge (forbidden: no fudge/clamp/tuning; do NOT touch RRTMG). The TOST-T2 residual will close only when the RRTMG-SW clear-sky surface-down shortwave attenuation is corrected (a separate RRTMG-SW sprint).
next_decision_needed: Manager: dispatch an RRTMG-SW sprint to localize the +0..+11% (air-mass-dependent) clear-sky surface-down SW excess (candidates: spectral solar flux / SCON, water-vapor + Rayleigh continuum, ozone profile, missing aerosol optical depth, slant-path/zenith handling). Re-TOST after that, NOT after a Noah-MP edit.
verdict: DAYTIME HFX OVER-FLUX ROOT-CAUSED to RRTMG-SW SWDOWN (+0..+11%, air-mass scaled). Noah-MP energy/albedo/CH/ground-flux all WRF-faithful. No in-scope faithful fix exists; hypothesized Noah-MP levers (a/b/d) falsified, (c) confirmed-but-upstream.
